title: Repealed by Acts 2006, No. 621, §20(B), eff. Jan. 1, 2009
doc_html:
§231.1.  Repealed by Acts 2006, No. 621, §20(B), eff. Jan. 1, 2009.

NOTE:  See Acts 2008, No. 618, providing that no special election be held to fill vacancy in office of recorder of mortgages and providing that any proclamation calling any such election shall be null, void, and of no effect.
doc_text:
§231.1.  Repealed by Acts 2006, No. 621, §20(B), eff. Jan. 1, 2009.
NOTE:  See Acts 2008, No. 618, providing that no special election be held to fill vacancy in office of recorder of mortgages and providing that any proclamation calling any such election shall be null, void, and of no effect.
